claims.claim: The 48D semantic lane is Astrid's communicative architecture; deterministic encoding gives a stable fingerprint rather than an arbitrary implementation detail.

The 768D to 8D semantic projection may flatten viscous persistence, silted lingering texture, and overlapping states into a linear narrative arc, so the projection should be compared against raw texture features.
Character-level entropy through the live 1024-character frequency window should still correlate with actual character entropy in codec dimensions 0-7.

Multi-modal projection preserving lingering persistence, active semantic motion, boundary porosity, and overlapping narrative state deserves concrete proposal evidence, but any live vector/gain/reserved-dim change requires approval.
